concept.name: already performed
concept.description: Definition:The requested action has already been performed and so this request has no effect

concept.name: end too late alert
concept.description: Definition:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the end of administration is too close to another planned therapy.

concept.name: start too late alert
concept.description: Definition:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the start of administration is too late after the onset of the condition.

concept.name: drug action detected issue
concept.description: Description:Proposed therapy may be contraindicated or ineffective based on an existing or recent drug therapy.

concept.name: Drug Interaction Alert
concept.description: Proposed therapy may interact with an existing or recent drug therapy

concept.name: End Too Late Alert
concept.description: Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the end of administration is too close to another planned therapy

concept.name: Food Interaction Alert
concept.description: Proposed therapy may interact with certain foods

concept.name: fulfillment alert
concept.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is in some way out of alignment with the requested therapy.

concept.name: held/suspended alert
concept.description: Definition:There should be no actions taken in fulfillment of a request that has been held or suspended.

concept.name: record recorded as historical
concept.description: Description: While the record was accepted in the repository, there is a more recent version of a record of this type.

concept.name: outside requested time
concept.description: Definition:The therapy action is being performed outside the bounds of the time period requested

concept.name: too soon within frequency based on the usage
concept.enDisplayName: too soon within frequency based on the usage
concept.description: Definition:The therapy action is being performed too soon after the previous occurrence based on the requested frequency

concept.name: Natural Health Product Alert
concept.frDisplayName: Alerte : interaction avec produit de santé naturel
concept.description: Proposed therapy may interact with existing or recent natural health product therapy

concept.name: Non-Prescription Interaction Alert
concept.frDisplayName: Alerte : interaction avec produit sans ordonnance
concept.description: Proposed therapy may interact with a non-prescription drug (e.g. alcohol, tobacco, Aspirin)

concept.name: no longer actionable
concept.description: Definition:The status of the request being fulfilled has changed such that it is no longer actionable. This may be because the request has expired, has already been completely fulfilled or has been otherwise stopped or disabled. (Not used for 'suspended' orders.)

concept.name: not equivalent alert
concept.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not sufficiently equivalent to the therapy which was requested.

concept.name: not generically equivalent alert
concept.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not generically equivalent (having the identical biological action) to the therapy which was requested.

concept.name: not therapeutically equivalent alert
concept.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not therapeutically equivalent (having the same overall patient effect) to the therapy which was requested.

concept.name: violates stated preferences
concept.frDisplayName: Ne respecte pas les préférences au dossier
concept.description: Definition:The proposed therapy goes against preferences or consent constraints recorded in the patient's record.

concept.name: violates stated preferences, alternate available
concept.frDisplayName: Ne respecte pas les préférences au dossier, option possible
concept.description: Definition:The proposed therapy goes against preferences or consent constraints recorded in the patient's record. An alternate therapy meeting those constraints is available.

concept.name: previously ineffective
concept.description: Definition:The same or similar treatment has previously been attempted with the patient without achieving a positive effect.

concept.name: Start Too Late Alert
concept.description: Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the start of administration is too late after the onset of the condition

concept.name: timing detected issue
concept.description: Description:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective based on the proposed start or end time.

concept.name: event timing incorrect alert
concept.description: Definition:The therapy is being performed at a time which diverges from the time the therapy was requested

concept.name: Refill Too Late Alert
concept.description: The patient is receiving a subsequent fill significantly later than would be expected based on the amount previously supplied and the therapy dosage instructions

concept.name: Refill Too Soon Alert
concept.description: The patient is receiving a subsequent fill significantly earlier than would be expected based on the amount previously supplied and the therapy dosage instructions

concept.name: Therapeutic Product Alert
concept.description: Proposed therapy may interact with an existing or recent therapeutic product
